title: Assorted Allays (200+ Allays)
description: The pack for all of your Allay variants!
body:
![Spark_server](https://i.imgur.com/UV1gvFp.jpg)

![Behold](https://i.imgur.com/8FzB5ZN.png)
***
Assorted Allays is the perfect pack for your allays, bringing many custom variants into your Minecraft World

![banner](https://i.imgur.com/CUmJ7rz.png)

![Addon](https://imgur.com/oYpzoJf.png)
***
This pack requires the mentioned features marked below:

![Optifine or EMF/ETF](https://i.imgur.com/MS5KZjL.png)

![Features](https://i.imgur.com/AfRhw7z.png93483284/1086427548889657395/Features.png)
***
The pack features 200+ Allay variants, each with a different look and size. These range from simple recolors to complex cameos. These mob variants can all be renamed to their appropriate skins and spawn naturally.
The pack is formatted to make it easy to create add-ons!

![Allay Thumbnail](https://i.imgur.com/a5sCIlb.png)

![](https://i.imgur.com/6mb4QDE.png)
***
[![](https://i.imgur.com/wbtkCOA.png)](discord.gg/kYYmAWQ)

![License Thumbnail](https://i.imgur.com/kMMMcRh.png483284/1086427549204226138/License.png)
